response.original_title: こちら全裸家政婦派遣所 巨乳課 浜崎真緒
response.overview: Mao Hamasaki stars in this "Nadeshiko Selection" feature as a professional from the "Naked Housekeeper Dispatch Agency." Sent to a relative's home to assist with domestic duties, she fulfills the fantasy of a housekeeper who works entirely in the nude. The film blends the "Relative's Wife" taboo with the "Big Tits Department" theme, focusing on the high-tension domestic encounters that occur when a refined family member abandons all modesty
response.tagline: Reporting for duty... and wearing absolutely nothing.
response.title: こちら全裸家政婦派遣所 巨乳課 浜崎真緒
